title: Friday Community Lunch
description: A welcoming lunch for families, students, travelers, and new Muslims.

title: Weekly Quran Reflection Circle
description: Read a short passage, review reliable tafsir, and leave with one action point.

title: Beginner Tajweed Clinic
description: Small-group correction focused on makharij, qalqalah, ghunnah, and short-surah fluency.

title: Weekend Food Pantry Volunteers
description: Pack and distribute food. Family-friendly roles are available.

title: New Muslim Mentor
description: Foundations support, prayer practice, community navigation, and referral to qualified teachers.

title: Faith-Centered Parenting
description: Age-appropriate worship, family routines, digital boundaries, and compassionate discipline.
